summary:
The server isn't running. Let me start it and test. Actually, the test.sh script starts and stops the server. Let me run a manual test:







<function_calls>
<invoke name="Bash">
<parameter name="command" string="true">node dist/server.js &
SERVER_PID=$!
sleep 2
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/inventory/WIDGET-001/adjust -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"quantity": -1000}' && echo
kill $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
